tasks.title: Connect GAIN to Polar.sh and activate checkout buttons
tasks.description: Create GAIN products in the Polar.sh account (Pro $100/mo, Business $250/mo, Enterprise $500/mo), wire the plan-selector dialog's 'Subscribe' CTAs to Polar checkout overlays via data-polar-checkout product IDs, and confirm the checkout overlay opens with the correct plan.
tasks.notes: Products created in Polar (3 standard + 3 MSSP + 1 Client add-on). listing.js wires data-polar-checkout product IDs to the Subscribe CTA on dialog open; href removed on render so Polar embed.js intercepts. Polar webhook live at polarwebhook-hmkyyu2gma-uc.a.run.app — writes stripePlan to Firestore on subscription events. PU#2 verified via Playwright: all 6 plan tabs (3 GAIN + 3 MSSP) set correct data-polar-checkout product IDs; no JS errors; href null on all CTAs.

proofUnits.title: GAIN Pro/Business/Enterprise products exist in Polar.sh
proofUnits.expectedBehavior: Polar.sh dashboard shows 3 GAIN products with correct names and monthly prices.
proofUnits.exactCommand: Log in to polar.sh → Dashboard → Products. Confirm GAIN Pro ($100/mo), Business ($250/mo), Enterprise ($500/mo) all exist with Price IDs.

proofUnits.title: Polar checkout overlay opens from plan-selector dialog
proofUnits.expectedBehavior: Clicking 'Subscribe' in the GAIN plan dialog opens the Polar checkout overlay for the selected plan.
proofUnits.exactCommand:
1. Open MojoAiStudio.com/products
2. Click 'Compare plans' → select Pro tab
3. Click 'Subscribe'
4. Confirm Polar checkout overlay opens showing GAIN Pro at $100/mo
5. Repeat for Business and Enterprise tabs
6. Check browser console — no errors
proofUnits.expectedInitialFailure: Clicking CTA goes to polar.sh root instead of overlay.
proofUnits.expectedPassingEvidence: Polar overlay opens for each plan with correct name and price.
proofUnits.evidence: data-polar-checkout set to correct product ID per tab; href null; no JS errors. GAIN: Pro=636b0777, Business=54ceb640, Enterprise=f95729d1. MSSP: Pro=e0063c13, Business=a3db7a0e, Enterprise=c61fc9b0.
